stub: She is a Conservative MP who comes from a white working class background.
constituency: She is from a constituency that is not your constituency.
personalization: She tends to vote in accordance with the instructions of her party, even when that conflicts with the wishes of her constituents.
substantive: She supports increased funding for the NHS.
justification: In political debates, she regularly explains how her decisions help to promote the national interest.
responsiveness: Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, she said: “I did not go into politics to win elections, but to make this country a better place.”
text: She is a Conservative MP who comes from a white working class background. She is from a constituency that is not your constituency. She tends to vote in accordance with the instructions of her party, even when that conflicts with the wishes of her constituents. She supports increased funding for the NHS. In political debates, she regularly explains how her decisions help to promote the national interest. Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, she said: “I did not go into politics to win elections, but to make this country a better place.”
